name: Is Graph Bipartite?
description: Given an undirected graph represented as an adjacency list, determine if the graph is bipartite. A graph is bipartite if the nodes can be partitioned into two sets such that every edge connects a node in one set to a node in the other.
constraints: 1 <= graph.length <= 100. 0 <= graph[i].length < 100. graph[u] does not contain u. All values in graph[u] are unique.
